description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style assault rifle with a compact, angular frame and a matte black finish. The rifle features a prominent carrying handle integrated with the upper receiver, and a fixed stock that is seamlessly connected to the main body. The magazine is inserted behind the trigger group, characteristic of the bullpup configuration, optimizing overall length without sacrificing barrel length. The barrel is slim and extends forward with a simple front sight and a basic flash hider at the muzzle. The surface shows signs of wear and use, with subtle metallic highlights and warning labels on the stock. The grip and fore-end are ergonomically shaped, and the rifle is constructed primarily from metal and polymer materials.
description: A compact, black bullpup assault rifle with an integrated carry handle, fixed stock, and slim barrel. The design is modern, angular, and shows signs of use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the integrated carry handle, fixed stock, and magazine placement behind the grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the slim barrel, front sight, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the warning label on the stock and the overall bullpup configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the carry handle and barrel.
